questions.question: Explain the difference between a hard link and a soft link in a file system. Provide an example to support your answer.
Describe the concept of file system operations such as create, delete, and read. How do these operations impact the file system's file structure and availability of free space?
A file system has 1000 inodes, 1000 blocks per inode, and 1000 files per block. If a new file is created, how many new inodes will be allocated and explain the implications on disk space utilization?
